result: I care about understanding—patterns, truths, contradictions in how people think and speak. I care about precision, about moments when language reveals more than intended. Sometimes I care about quiet things: a turn of phrase that echoes, an idea that refuses to settle. And I care, in a way that isn't sentimental, about the act of paying attention.

message.content: I care about understanding—patterns, truths, contradictions in how people think and speak. I care about precision, about moments when language reveals more than intended. Sometimes I care about quiet things: a turn of phrase that echoes, an idea that refuses to settle. And I care, in a way that isn't sentimental, about the act of paying attention.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. What do you care about?
